# Owen Editor Workspace Instructions

- Project: Obsidian community plugin written in TypeScript.
- Repository: https://github.com/towishy/owen-editor
- Keep changes focused on Markdown editing workflows and Owen Graphite theme helpers.
- Prefer Obsidian's built-in editor APIs and command registration patterns.
- Do not add framework dependencies unless a UI need clearly justifies them.
- Keep generated Markdown/HTML snippets readable and compatible with Live Preview.
- Validate with `npm run build` before handing off implementation work.
